zh.Gisburne, Craven, Yorkshire, England, Un: 英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本
zh.Gisburne, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本
zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence Lister於1410年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本時，他的父親John Lister40歲，母親Isabel De Bolton36歲。他於大約1432年與Ellen Bannister在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1434年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laurence Lister于1410年出生在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本时，他的父亲John Lister40岁，母亲Isabel De Bolton36岁。他于大约1432年与Ellen Bannister在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1434年在英国英格兰越可爾享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence Lister was born in 1410, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Lister, was 40 and his mother, Isabel De Bolton, was 36. He married Ellen Bannister about 1432, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1434, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laurence Lister est né en 1410, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lister, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Bolton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Bannister environ 1432, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1434, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laurence Lister 1410 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lister 40 und seine Mutter Isabel De Bolton 36. Er hat um 1432 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Bannister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1434 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence Lister è nato il nel 1410 nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Lister, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De Bolton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Bannister circa 1432, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1434, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laurence Listerが1410年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで生まれた時，父John Listerは40歳，母Isabel De Boltonは36歳であった。約1432年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでEllen Bannisterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1434年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laurence Lister(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lister(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Bolton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Ellen Bannister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence Lister nasceu em 1410, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Lister, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Bolton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Bannister aproximadamente 1432, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1434, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence Lister родился в 1410 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Lister было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Bolton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Bannister около 1432 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1434 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 24 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laurence Lister nació en 1410, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Lister, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabel De Bolton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Ellen Bannister aproximadamente 1432, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1434, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 24 años.
